title: poa × coarctata var. montana
intro: Poa × coarctata var. montana, also known as Mountain Poa or Alpine Poa, is a hybrid plant species of grass in the Poaceae family. It is native to high-altitude regions in the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Poa × coarctata var. montana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in natural remedies for its potential to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
